case_title: O'KEEFE, LEONARD VS ANDERSON, DARYLLYN JEAN AKA MOFFITT, DARYLLIN JEAN

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DARYLLYN JEAN AKA MOFFITT, DARYLLIN JEAN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'KEEFE, LEONARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DARYLLYN JEAN AKA MOFFITT, DARYLLIN JEAN $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,705.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MEMO OF COSTS RETURN TO PLFT. CAN'T CALIM COST OR INTEREST. MUST SET ASIDE FORMS FIRST BEFORE THEY CAN FILE A MEMORANDUM.
MEMO OF COST RETURNED TO LEONARD O'KEEFE. GIVE INSTRUCTION TO SET ASIDE THE TERMS OF JUDGMENT.
COPY OF CORRESPONDENCE TO PLAINTIFF FROM DEFENDANT FILED;
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY O'KEEFE, LEONARD AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DARYLLYN JEAN AKA MOFFITT, DARYLLIN JEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
